title: PowerBaseFit Content Excellence Standard
principle: PowerBaseFit content must serve real buyers, reflect manufacturing experience, support purchase decisions, and become a long-term commercial asset.

standards.name: Professional Depth
standards.requirement: Content must show product understanding, manufacturing experience, material knowledge, production process, QC, procurement experience, and industry context.

standards.name: Truthfulness
standards.requirement: Content must not invent customers, cases, certifications, data, factory capabilities, partner brands, rankings, or promises.
mustInclude: Missing Evidence label when proof is unavailable

standards.name: Buyer Value
standards.requirement: Content must help distributors, importers, gym owners, OEM brands, retailers, and commercial buyers make sourcing decisions.

standards.name: Manufacturer Differentiation
standards.requirement: Content must show PowerBaseFit manufacturing capability without inventing unverified details.

standards.name: Competitive Superiority
standards.requirement: Every brief or draft must explain why strong competing pages work and how PowerBaseFit can provide deeper buyer help and stronger manufacturing evidence.
prohibited: Rewriting competitor structure without added evidence

criteria.name: Professional Depth
criteria.passRequirement: Explains materials, specifications, manufacturing process, quality checks, and practical buyer implications.

criteria.name: Buyer Value
criteria.passRequirement: Answers real procurement questions for distributors, importers, gym owners, OEM brands, retailers, and commercial buyers.

criteria.name: Manufacturing Expertise
criteria.passRequirement: Shows factory capability, production process, QC, customization, packaging, and export support with evidence.

criteria.name: Trust Level
criteria.passRequirement: Avoids unverified claims and labels missing proof clearly.

criteria.name: Content Completeness
criteria.passRequirement: Includes introduction, definitions, features, selection method, comparison, manufacturing, QC, FAQ, procurement advice, and summary when relevant.

criteria.name: Differentiation
criteria.passRequirement: Explains why PowerBaseFit is credible through factory experience, product expertise, service capability, and evidence.

criteria.name: Image Readiness
criteria.passRequirement: Plans at least 2-3 useful images with purpose, scene, alt text, and title.

criteria.name: Conversion Readiness
criteria.passRequirement: Includes buyer CTA, quote readiness, internal links, and clear next step.

validation-rules.passCondition: The page target, buyer, search intent, and business purpose are explicit.
validation-rules.failAction: Block Draft and return to brief refinement.

validation-rules.passCondition: The planned page type matches search intent and Opportunity Engine decision.
validation-rules.failAction: Block Draft until page type is corrected.

validation-rules.passCondition: Factory, product, QC, packaging, OEM, and project proof are present or clearly marked Missing Evidence.
validation-rules.failAction: Block unsupported claims and require Missing Evidence labels.

validation-rules.passCondition: At least 2-3 relevant images are planned with purpose, scene, alt text, and title.
validation-rules.failAction: Block Draft until image plan is complete.

validation-rules.passCondition: The content explains why PowerBaseFit is credible and more helpful than generic competitor coverage.
validation-rules.failAction: Block Draft until differentiation is added.

validation-rules.passCondition: Content Excellence Score is 90 or higher.

image-rules.prohibitedUse: Do not use decorative or invented factory images as proof.
Do not use unrelated lifestyle images that do not help buyers inspect the product.
Do not imply a brand cooperation unless verified.
Do not invent customer cases or project photos.
Do not add generic stock imagery that does not improve buyer understanding.

evidence-rules.ifMissing: Missing Evidence: factory image required before draft.
Missing Evidence: QC image or process proof required.
Missing Evidence: product detail image required.
Missing Evidence: packaging image or packaging specification required.
Missing Evidence: do not invent customer or project case.
